channel.title: APIs on BF Website
channel.description: Recent content in APIs on BF Website

item.title: BF API
item.description: The current BF Taxonomy comprizes the BF Input/Output Check(_INP), Memory Corruption/Disclosure (_MEM), and Data Type (_DAT) Class Types and the BF Failure (_FLR) Class Type. Please use the BF Taxonomy APIs anf the BF Formal Language APIs menus.

item.title: BF Propagations API
item.description: Please use the BF Formal Language APIs > BF Propagations API menu.

item.title: BF Relations API
item.description: Please use the BF Formal Language APIs > BF Relations API menu.

item.title: BFVUL API
item.description: Please use the BFVUL APIs menu on top.

item.title: BFCVE API
item.description: Please use the BFVUL APIs menu on top.

item.title: BFCWE API
item.description: Please use the BFCWE APIs menu on top.
